meta.siteTitle: AI Machine - The Future Of Automation
meta.siteDescription: Engineering company delivering advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings.

aboutSection.description: Engineering company delivering advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings.

items.title: AMR & AGV
items.shortDescription: Autonomous mobile robots and automated guided vehicles for modern logistics.
items.fullDescription: Our AMR & AGV solutions provide cutting-edge autonomous navigation and material handling for warehouses, factories, and distribution centers. These intelligent vehicles optimize workflow, reduce operational costs, and increase productivity.

items.title: Warehouse Automation
items.shortDescription: End-to-end warehouse automation solutions for maximum efficiency.
items.fullDescription: Transform your warehouse operations with our comprehensive automation solutions. From automated storage and retrieval systems to conveyor networks and sortation systems, we design and implement solutions that dramatically improve throughput.

items.title: Service Robots
items.shortDescription: Intelligent service robotics for commercial and hospitality applications.
items.fullDescription: Our service robots bring automation to customer-facing environments. From hotel concierge robots to commercial cleaning and delivery robots, we provide intelligent solutions that enhance customer experience.

items.title: Smart Security
items.shortDescription: Comprehensive AI-powered security and surveillance solutions.
items.fullDescription: Protect your assets with our intelligent security systems. Combining AI-powered video analytics, access control, and integrated monitoring platforms, our solutions provide comprehensive security for any facility.

items.title: Modern Warehouse
items.shortDescription: Fully automated warehouse facility with integrated AMR fleet and intelligent management systems.
items.fullDescription: A state-of-the-art warehouse facility featuring fully automated storage and retrieval systems, a fleet of autonomous mobile robots, and an integrated warehouse management system. This project showcases our ability to deliver end-to-end automation solutions.

items.title: Luxury Villa
items.shortDescription: Premium smart home installation with full automation and intelligent building management.
items.fullDescription: A luxury residential project featuring comprehensive smart home automation including lighting, climate, security, entertainment, and energy management systems. All controlled through an intuitive interface.

items.title: Business Hotel
items.shortDescription: Smart hotel system with automated guest services and energy management.
items.fullDescription: An intelligent hotel management system providing automated guest services, energy optimization, security surveillance, and smart room controls. Enhancing guest experience while reducing operational costs.

items.title: Office Complex
items.shortDescription: Intelligent building automation for a modern office complex.
items.fullDescription: A comprehensive building automation project for a multi-story office complex, featuring intelligent HVAC, lighting, access control, and workspace management systems designed for maximum comfort and energy efficiency.

buildings.description: We design and implement smart building solutions that transform ordinary spaces into intelligent environments. Our systems integrate lighting, climate, security, and entertainment into seamless automated experiences.

sections.title: Smart Home Automation
sections.description: Complete home automation solutions including lighting control, climate management, automated blinds, and integrated entertainment systems.

sections.title: Building Management Systems
sections.description: Centralized building management platforms that optimize energy usage, monitor systems health, and provide real-time control over all building systems.

supervision.description: Our supervision services ensure that your automation and building systems operate at peak performance. We provide expert oversight, monitoring, and maintenance to keep your systems running smoothly.

sections.title: System Monitoring
sections.description: 24/7 real-time monitoring of all automated systems with instant alerts and rapid response protocols.

sections.title: Preventive Maintenance
sections.description: Scheduled maintenance programs that prevent downtime and extend the lifespan of your automation systems.

sections.title: Technical Support
sections.description: Dedicated technical support team available around the clock to resolve any issues quickly and efficiently.

aboutPage.title: About AI Machine
aboutPage.subtitle: The Future of Automation
aboutPage.story: AI Machine is an engineering company specializing in advanced automation systems and intelligent buildings. We combine cutting-edge technology with industry expertise to deliver solutions that transform how businesses and buildings operate.
aboutPage.mission: Our mission is to make intelligent automation accessible and practical for every industry, creating smarter, more efficient, and more sustainable environments.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We constantly push the boundaries of what's possible with automation technology.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every solution we deliver meets the highest standards of reliability and performance.

values.title: Partnership
values.description: We work closely with our clients to understand their unique needs and deliver tailored solutions.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Let's build the future together
contactPage.description: Ready to transform your business with intelligent automation? Get in touch with our team.
